focus: A2-deepen: settle latent F-A2-01 (archived-tier enrichment skip gap) + F-A2-03 (access-denied E089 over-broad match)
noveltyJustification: Deepen/settle pass on two pre-existing P2s; no new findings expected or produced. Both deciders resolved against actual writers/constraints: F-A2-01 dormant (no archived-tier writer; triple-locked by CHECK constraint + MCP enum + writer census), F-A2-03 benign (Node EACCES uses 'permission denied' not 'access denied'; only deliberate path-safety throws carry the literal and correctly route to E089). Neither rises to P1.

findingDetails.title: background-enrichment skip-guard omits 'archived' tier (DORMANT)
findingDetails.evidence: Guard tests only importance_tier==='deprecated'; search hides ('deprecated','archived') at hybrid-search.ts:2061. No writer persists 'archived': CHECK constraint vector-index-schema.ts:2609 + schema-downgrade.ts:135 exclude it; MCP enum tool-schemas.ts:301 + cli.ts:250 validTiers exclude it; writer census (reconsolidation.ts:518, lineage-state.ts:457/1380, auto-promotion.ts:247 upward-only, vector-index-mutations.ts:533 enum-gated, chunking-orchestrator.ts:500) never emits 'archived'; tier-classifier.ts:496 shouldArchive() unwired (tests only); the two 'archived' tier assignments are test fixtures (gate-d-regression-*.vitest.ts:149,52).
findingDetails.recommendation: Hold at P2 latent. Do not 'fix' the guard before a writer exists; if archived tier is ever wired, add it to the guard at memory-save.ts:2877, the CHECK at vector-index-schema.ts:2609, and the MCP enum at tool-schemas.ts:301 together.
findingDetails.scopeProof: declared A2 target handlers/memory-save.ts:2877; counterevidence in declared cross-ref search/storage layers

findingDetails.title: classifySaveErrorCode E089 matches generic 'access denied' (BENIGN)
findingDetails.evidence: E089 branch matches lower.includes('access denied'). No real misroute: Node EACCES messages use 'permission denied' (not matched) so fall to E081 catch-all; DB branch (response-builder.ts:511-520) precedes E089; only production throw-sites of literal 'access denied' are deliberate path-safety validators (formatters/search-results.ts:235,239; utils/validators.ts:125,129) that correctly belong in E089. Codebase vocabulary split confirmed: lib/errors/core.ts:307 keys path-safety on /access denied/i; errors-comprehensive.vitest.ts:204 maps EACCES->'Permission denied.'
findingDetails.recommendation: Hold at P2 advisory. Optionally tighten substring to 'access denied: path' in a later A7 hardening pass to remove latent over-broad-by-shape risk; no current behavior change needed.
findingDetails.scopeProof: declared A2 target handlers/save/response-builder.ts:526; throw-site census in declared error/validation surfaces

traceabilityChecks: tier-write census closed: no writer emits 'archived'
CHECK constraint verified in real schema vector-index-schema.ts:2609 + schema-downgrade.ts:135
classifySaveErrorCode precedence verified: DB E088 before validation E089
iteration-number mismatch flagged (dispatch slot 16 vs JSONL-derived 3 under parallel-safety)
edgeCases: iteration-number mismatch: dispatch slot 16 vs JSONL-derived 3 (parallel-worker design; honored dispatch slot, no shared-state write)
test fixtures seed importance_tier='archived' directly (test-only, not a runtime writer); no enrichment-skip test covers archived rows because production cannot create one (A6 carry-forward)
F-A2-03 future-activation shape: a future/3rd-party throw with literal 'access denied' for a non-validation cause would misroute; none exists today (A7 carry-forward)
ruledOut: F-A2-01 -> P1 (live archived guard gap): REFUTED - no writer; CHECK+enum+census block it; shouldArchive unwired
F-A2-03 -> P1 (OS-EACCES misrouted to E089): REFUTED - EACCES uses 'permission denied' not matched; falls to E081; only path-safety throws carry 'access denied' and belong in E089
